channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: '75% of resumes never reach a human': Here’s the hidden reason your application is getting rejected by AI
item.description: AI-driven hiring systems filter resumes using rigid keywords and formatting rules, causing qualified candidates to be rejected before human review.

item.title: What is the release date for The Testaments episode 5 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: The grisly truth about Dr Grove has finally come to light. But when does The Testaments episode 5 drop on Hulu and Disney+?

item.title: 4 unmissable new movies and TV shows to get excited by on Netflix this week (April 19-26)
item.description: From Stranger Things' return to a new survival thriller movie, you won't want to miss this film and TV show quartet.

item.title: Cracks are starting to form on fusion energy’s funding boom
item.description: Fusion startups and investors risk deepening fissures if some key disagreements aren't settled amicably.

item.title: Man City vs Arsenal Live Streams: How to watch Premier League 2025/26 from anywhere in the world
item.description: All the ways to watch Man City vs Arsenal live streams online and from anywhere, in a prospective Premier League 2025/26 title decider at the Etihad.

item.title: '5.6 million names headed to the Moon': Here's how to buy the SanDisk Ultra microSD series used by the Artemis II mission
item.description: The same microSD card used to take 5.6 million names to the Moon as part of the Artemis II mission is available to buy.

item.title: Marathon battery life makes Keychron’s Ultra 8K keyboards its best yet
item.description: Keychron's expansive keyboard catalog covers everything from basic full-size mechanical boards to niche layouts like southpaw Alice or a one-handed half-keyboard for gaming. Its Q and V series are among our go-to recommendations for off-the-shelf keyboards, and the latest iterations - the Q and V Ultra models - are a straightforward upgrade to the lineup, […]...

item.title: The future of local TV news has taken a Trumpian turn
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more stories on Big Tech versus politics in Washington, DC, follow Tina Nguyen and read Regulator. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started A long time […]

item.title: I compared Amazon's new Ember QLED and LED TVs side-by-side — and there's a clear winner
item.description: I put two of Amazon's Fire TVs, now known as Ember TVs, head-to-head to find out which is better value for money

item.title: Pourquoi l’iPhone 4 reste le smartphone le plus important de l’histoire d’Apple
item.description: Si l'on vous demande quel est l'iPhone le plus important de l'histoire, vous ne penserez sans doute pas spontanément à l'iPhone 4. Pourtant, il a de solides arguments pour revendiquer ce titre : une fuite digne d'un film d'espionnage, une controverse mondiale et un design dont l'héritage perdure encore aujourd'hui.

item.title: Blue Origin successfully re-uses a New Glenn rocket for the first time ever
item.description: It's a major milestone for the company's new mega-rocket system, putting it in position to challenge SpaceX's dominance of the global launch market.

item.title: Data centers : une loi va faciliter leur installation, les associations s’inquiètent
item.description: Mardi 14 avril, l'Assemblée nationale a adopté une nouvelle loi qui devrait faciliter l'implantation des centres de données en France, pendant que le centre de réflexion The Shift Project plaide pour la mise en place d'une planification nationale et territoriale de l'ensemble du secteur, dans un nouveau rapport publié le même jour.

item.title: Hands on: The Punkt. MC03 secure rugged phone revealed that it still has some development hurdles to cross before it is ready for Joe Public
item.description: The Punkt. MC03 is a third-generation design that puts data security front and centre

item.title: Is ‘Founder Mode’ sustainable for modern leaders?
item.description: How to preserve energy, delegate effectively, and stay connected to what matters most, without burning out. “Founder mode” often glorifies speed, control, and intensity. The hands-on leadership style has sparked debate about whether it is sustainable over the long term. Below, industry experts who have studied the balance between maintaining close involvement and building scalable systems share twelve practical strategies for preserving energy, delegating effectively, and staying connected to what matters most without burning out....

item.title: La toute nouvelle JBL Xtreme 5 est déjà en promotion chez Boulanger
item.description: La JBL Xtreme 5 mêle tradition et modernité puisqu'elle reprend des éléments déjà efficaces sur les anciennes itérations. Toutefois, des liserés d'ambiance lumineux sont venus se joindre à la fête. Attendue très prochainement, cette nouvelle enceinte passe déjà de 349,99 euros à 314,99 euros chez Boulanger.
